message:
test(core): expand disjoint_intervals and union_find inline test coverage

disjoint_intervals.rs (+317 lines of tests):
- default_is_empty, from_config_merge_adjacent_false
- Comprehensive coverage of insert, remove, contains, overlap, merge,
  split, and boundary edge cases
- Tests for DisjointIntervalsConfig interaction with merge_adjacent flag

union_find.rs (+49 lines of tests):
- stats_empty_structure_reports_zero_largest_component
- union_same_element_is_noop
- all_components_are_sorted_by_first_member
- Additional edge cases for connected(), component_count()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
